{{Quote|So, Han Solo, I trust you appreciate our... hospitality?|Arb Skynxnex to Han Solo|<ref name="Jedi Search" />}}
'''Arb Skynxnex''' was a tall, lanky [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was [[Moruth Doole]]'s enforcer on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. He used a specially modified weapon known as a [[double blaster]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Han Solo. You're going to wish you never survived landing on Kessel.|Arb Skynxnex to Han Solo and Chewbacca|<ref name="Jedi Search" />}}
Skynxnex had, prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], been sent to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel's]] [[Kessel prison|prison]], where he barely avoided a death sentence. At some point, he encountered [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during one of his smuggling runs to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Eventually, after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] defeat at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], an administrator of the prison, [[Moruth Doole]], staged a revolt against the Imperials present and took control of the planet, along with the nearby [[Garrison Moon]]. Doole freed many of the prisoners on Kessel, including Skynxnex, who he made his second-in-command for having previously killed a hitman who had been sent to kill Doole.<ref name="Jedi Search" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Skynxnex topped [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s list of criminals to free from Kessel and send to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as part of an operation to divert Imperial resources away from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] covert reconnaissance mission on the planet. Doole refused to give up his enforcer, and [[Zekka Thyne]] was moved to the top of the list.<ref name="Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>

[[11 ABY/Legends|Five years later]], Skynxnex led Doole's forces in their capture of Han Solo and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who had crash-landed on Kessel after being sent by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as informal ambassadors. During the pair's escape, Skynxnex was killed by an [[energy spider]].<ref name="Jedi Search" />
